subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Your Role in Workplace Safety
description: One-minute skill: Your Role in Workplace Safety.

hook.text: You don't need a safety title to prevent injuries. Every worker is a safety professional.

buildup.text: Hazard recognition, speaking up, and following procedures are skills every worker can use.

discovery.text: The safest workplaces have workers who actively look for and report hazards before they cause harm.

twist.text: Saying 'that's not my job' about safety is how hazards become injuries for everyone.

climax.text: One person stopping an unsafe act protects every worker in the area.

punchline.text: See something unsafe? Say something. You don't need permission to prevent harm.

quiz.question: What makes the safest workplaces different?
options: Workers actively look for and report hazards
They spend the most on equipment
